title: 好敵手と書いて友と呼ぶ！

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ugh! This sucks! This sucks! This sucks!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Tokai Teio comes charging into my
office in a huff.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I lost to McQueen in the math test by one point. One measly point! Ugh, I can't believe it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But I'll get her back in tomorrow's sports science
test! I better start cramming now! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: To the library, duh! C'mon, hurry up!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Okay, the textbook should be around he—wait...
McQueen?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You've got the book...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What, this? I'm about to borrow it. Does that
bother you for some reason?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yes, it does! It bothers me a whole lot! First off—

text_block_list.name: Library Staff
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, please keep it down while you're in
the library.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh... sorry. Right. Gotta use my quiet voice.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
See, the way it works is, I had my eyes on that
book first, so I get to borrow it first!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
These books are property of the academy, are
they not? If you need this one, then why don't we
have a look at it together?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: That's, uh... not really what I had in mind...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Well, then I do not understand. Shall I assume you
have no issue with me borrowing this book?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: No way! I'm telling you not to do that! Because I have to—

text_block_list.name: Library Staff
text_block_list.text: Ahem! Didn't I just remind you to keep it down?

text_block_list.name: Library Staff
text_block_list.text:
I won't have you disturbing the other visitors. The
both of you are banned from the library for the
rest of the day!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: No waaay!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I must leave as well?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
An Umamusume of the prestigious Mejiro family,
barred from entering the library...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ah, this shame will forever stain our legacy...
choice_data_list: You caused a bit of a scene there.
You caused a bit of a scene there.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Grrr... Gah!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I can't help it. When it's McQueen I'm up
against...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I just can't allow myself to lose!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Teio...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Whatever am I to do with you?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hrnghhh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Look at you. How long do you intend to stand
around moping? Shall we consider this match of
ours over?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: No, no, no! This isn't over!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But... now that the library's out of bounds, I'm
gonna need somewhere else to study...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah! I know! Hey, Trainer! Lend me your
office, will you?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I knew you'd say that! That's my trainer for ya! ♪
All right, let's go, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: You want me to come with you?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the amicable duo begin their studies... Or
at least they try to.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat? You're still on that same question? You
know I'm already three down.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Enough out of you! I cannot concentrate! This is
not a race, so speed should have no say in the
matter!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They won't get any useful studying done at this
rate. I should step in.
choice_data_list: Why not compete by quizzing each other?

If you're so intent on seeing who's better, why
not just race?

If you're so intent on seeing who's better, why
not just race?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They won't get any useful studying done at this
rate. I should step in.
choice_data_list: Why not compete by quizzing each other?

If you're so intent on seeing who's better, why
not just race?

If you're so intent on seeing who's better, why
not just race?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ooh, sounds good! Let's start right now!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
What is the term for the energy exerted on your
legs when they make contact with the ground
while running?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Energy... it must be "ground reaction force"!
Hehe, this is nothing for me!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Grr... Correct.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now, I suppose it would be my turn. On the
subject of ground reaction force and its point of
contact...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two become locked in a long battle. The next
day, I hear that the match ended in a draw, with
both of them getting perfect scores.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah, nice idea! The books can wait!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. Let us end this petty rivalry and set the
record straight once and for all.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: All right, Trainer, I'll be back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, I hear that both of their track times
improved considerably. Their test results,
however, were unsatisfactory.
